task_completion.description: Navigate to the Service Security page in GeoServer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoServer web administration interface is open, and the 'Service Security' page (under Security -> Services) is displayed, showing the list of service access rules.

task_completion.description: Configure WFS Transaction rule for ADMIN role
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rule configuration screen or list entry showing Service set to 'wfs' (or '*'), Method set to 'Transaction', and Role restricted to 'ADMIN'.

task_completion.description: Configure WFS GetFeature rule for Anonymous role
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rule configuration screen or list entry showing Service set to 'wfs' (or '*'), Method set to 'GetFeature', and Role allowed for 'Anonymous' (or '*' / 'ROLE_ANONYMOUS').

task_completion.description: Save and verify the Service Security rules
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final Service Security rules list displays both the WFS Transaction rule restricted to ADMIN and the WFS GetFeature rule allowed for Anonymous, indicating the changes were successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the GeoServer web GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GeoServer web interface (buttons, forms, dropdowns) rather than terminal commands (like curl) to modify the configuration.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual GeoServer application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the URL http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ and the standard GeoServer interface is visible.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake the UI changes using browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and actively being used to alter the text of the rules list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target service is 'wfs'. Target write method is 'Transaction'. Target read method is 'GetFeature'. The target layer is 'ne:ne_countries' from the Natural Earth dataset, though the security rules are applied at the service level. The role 'ADMIN' is used for Transaction, and 'Anonymous' (or equivalent public access like '*' or 'ROLE_ANONYMOUS') for GetFeature.
